auth.email_already_registered: This email is already registered. Please log in or use a different email.
auth.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
auth.token_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.token_invalid: Invalid authentication token. Please log in again.
auth.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this resource.
auth.verification_rate_limit: Too many verification attempts. Please wait before requesting another code.
auth.verification_code_expired: Your verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.verification_code_invalid: The verification code you entered is invalid. Please check and try again.

user.already_exists: A user with this information already exists.
user.invalid_status: Cannot perform this action due to invalid user status.
user.profile_incomplete: Please complete your profile before proceeding.

validation.failed: The information you provided is invalid. Please check and try again.
validation.email_invalid: Please provide a valid email address.
validation.password_weak: Your password must be at least 8 characters and contain both letters and numbers.

database.connection_failed: Unable to connect to the database. Please try again later.
database.query_failed: A database error occurred. Please try again.
database.duplicate_key: This information already exists in our system.
database.transaction_failed: Unable to complete the operation. Please try again.

system.internal_error: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified.
system.service_unavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
system.timeout: The request took too long to process. Please try again.
system.configuration_error: A system configuration error occurred. Please contact support.

resource.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
resource.conflict: The resource is in conflict with existing data.
resource.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this resource.

rate_limit.exceeded: You have made too many requests. Please wait before trying again.
